comment: Marketplace catalog. Each tool entry points at a downloadable, SHA-pinned bundle (a GitHub Release zip of the built tool). Contributors publish by PR-ing an entry here. The shell fetches this file to render the marketplace. download/sha256 are filled when a release exists; null until then.

tools.name: Concep Deck
tools.description: De CAD a render con IA — workshop deck (Primlux / Concep).
tools.author: Albert Marimón
